# Outdoor Adventures BC

> Kelowna, BC fishing charter and sightseeing tour company. Private captained trips on Okanagan, Shuswap and Arrow Lakes aboard a 26-foot Kingfisher 2525 Weekender.

## Core facts

- Business: Outdoor Adventures BC
- Service: Guided fishing charters and sightseeing tours
- Base: Kelowna, British Columbia, Canada
- Phone: 250-902-8323
- Email: info@outdooradventuresbc.ca
- Hours: 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM, 7 days a week
- Rate: $200 CAD per hour, up to 6 guests
- Boat: Kingfisher 2525 Weekender (25'11", aluminum, heated cabin, full head, fridge)
- Service area: Okanagan Lake, Shuswap Lake, Kalamalka Lake, Mabel Lake, Upper Arrow Lake, Lower Arrow Lake, Kinbasket Lake
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/outdooradventure.bc

## Target species by lake

- Okanagan Lake (Kelowna): kokanee salmon, rainbow trout, lake trout
- Shuswap Lake: chinook salmon, lake trout, rainbow trout, burbot
- Arrow Lakes: Gerrard rainbow trout, bull trout, kokanee salmon, rainbow trout

## Pages

- [Home](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/): Kelowna fishing charters overview
- [Fishing charters](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/kelowna-fishing-charters.html): Guided charter details, species table, pricing
- [Sightseeing tours](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/sightseeing-tours.html): Private boat tours and sunset cruises
- [Our boat](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/our-boat.html): Kingfisher 2525 Weekender specifications
- [Okanagan Lake](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/lakes/okanagan-lake.html): Kokanee, rainbow and lake trout fishery
- [Shuswap Lake](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/lakes/shuswap-lake.html): Chinook, lake trout and burbot fishery
- [Arrow Lakes](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/lakes/arrow-lake.html): Trophy Gerrard rainbow and bull trout fishery
- [About](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/about.html): Company story and values
- [FAQ](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/faq.html): Pricing, licences, what to bring, cancellation
- [Contact / booking](https://outdooradventuresbc.ca/contact.html): Booking form and contact details
